name: Whole Milk

pros.title: slots into meals very easily
pros.explanation: Practical versatility matters a lot for dairy.

pros.title: easy to fit into familiar meals
pros.explanation: That lowers friction for regular use.

pros.title: easy protein delivery for normal diets
pros.explanation: Dairy gets real credit for convenience.

cons.title: fat quality varies wildly across dairy
cons.explanation: Some dairy is clean, some really is not.

cons.title: tolerance varies a lot person to person
cons.explanation: A category strength is less useful if the food does not agree with you.

cons.title: some versions get dense fast on fat, sodium, or both
cons.explanation: The category swings a lot by format.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate representative placeholders for ruleset tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
